Created attachment 151124
Proposed patch (since 373916 revision)

Patch to update deskutils/treesheets port from 0.0.20141104 to 0.0.20141225 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/aardappel/treesheets/compare/4417a4f...6ff99fb

- Removed GH_PROJECT=${PORTNAME}, because of defined by default, in case of USE_GITHUB.
